title: Number of Calls Between Two Persons
description: For each unique pair (person1, person2), return total calls and duration. Normalize so person1 < person2.
constraints: (from_id, to_id, duration) has no explicit primary key — duplicate rows possible
Calls between A→B and B→A are the same pair and must be aggregated together
key_concept: LEAST/GREATEST to normalize direction, then GROUP BY normalized pair.

hints.L1: Normalize (caller, recipient) pairs using LEAST/GREATEST regardless of direction.
hints.L2: SELECT LEAST(from_id,to_id) AS person1, GREATEST(from_id,to_id) AS person2, COUNT(*) AS call_count, SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM Calls GROUP BY person1, person2
hints.L3: SELECT LEAST(from_id,to_id) AS person1, GREATEST(from_id,to_id) AS person2, COUNT(*) AS call_count, SUM(duration) AS total_duration FROM Calls GROUP BY 1,2
